description: Semantic validation rules for SCLX 1.3 with worksheet-native ledger entry support. Transactions may contain one or more lines and are not required to balance unless the producer chooses to emit fully canonical double-entry transactions.

rules.description: format must equal SCLX and version must equal 1.3.
rules.expression: format == 'SCLX' and version == '1.3'

rules.description: Account Number values must be unique across the chart of accounts.
rules.expression: unique(chartOfAccounts[].Number)

rules.description: If Parent is present, it must reference another account Number.
rules.expression: forall account in chartOfAccounts: account.Parent is null or exists(chartOfAccounts[Number == account.Parent])

rules.description: The Parent relationship must not contain cycles.
rules.expression: acyclic_parent_graph(chartOfAccounts, 'Number', 'Parent')

rules.description: IncreaseSide should normally agree with account Type.
rules.expression: ASSET/EXPENSE => DEBIT; LIABILITY/NET_ASSETS/REVENUE => CREDIT

rules.description: Each transaction must contain at least one line.
rules.expression: count(lines) >= 1

rules.description: A line must not have both debit and credit nonzero.
rules.expression: not (decimal(debit) > 0 and decimal(credit) > 0)

rules.description: A line must not have both debit and credit equal to zero.
rules.expression: not (decimal(debit) == 0 and decimal(credit) == 0)

rules.description: When a transaction contains more than one line, producers are encouraged to emit a balanced set of postings when the source system provides enough information to do so.
rules.expression: count(lines) == 1 or sum(lines[].debit) == sum(lines[].credit)

rules.description: Each line accountId must resolve to a chart of accounts record.
rules.expression: exists(chartOfAccounts[accountId == line.accountId or Number == line.accountId])

rules.description: If fundId is present, it must resolve to funds.fundId.
rules.expression: line.fundId is null or exists(funds[fundId == line.fundId])

rules.description: If budgetId is present, it must resolve to budgets.budgetId.
rules.expression: line.budgetId is null or exists(budgets[budgetId == line.budgetId])

rules.description: If personId is present, it must resolve to people.personId.
rules.expression: line.personId is null or exists(people[personId == line.personId])

rules.description: If eventId is present, it must resolve to events.eventId.
rules.expression: line.eventId is null or exists(events[eventId == line.eventId])

rules.description: If documentId is present, it must resolve to documents.documentId.
rules.expression: line.documentId is null or exists(documents[documentId == line.documentId])

rules.description: Supplemental references must resolve to the correct collection.
rules.expression: OUTSTANDING_ITEM => exists(outstandingItems[outstandingItemId == recordId]); OTHER_ASSET_ITEM => exists(otherAssetItems[otherAssetItemId == recordId]); SUPPLEMENTAL_ITEM => exists(supplementalItems[supplementalItemId == recordId])

rules.description: If ledgerLink is present, ledgerLink.transactionId and ledgerLink.lineId must resolve to an actual line in transactions. Null ledgerLink is allowed for standalone workbook schedule rows.
rules.expression: ledgerLink is null or exists(transactions[transactionId == ledgerLink.transactionId and exists(lines[lineId == ledgerLink.lineId])])

rules.description: ledgerLink.transactionId and ledgerLink.lineId must resolve to an actual line in transactions.
rules.expression: exists(transactions[transactionId == ledgerLink.transactionId and exists(lines[lineId == ledgerLink.lineId])])

rules.description: bankAccountId should resolve to an ASSET account when present.
rules.expression: bankAccountId is null or exists(chartOfAccounts[(accountId == bankAccountId or Number == bankAccountId) and Type == 'ASSET'])

rules.description: If transactionId is present, referenced transaction must exist.
rules.expression: transactionId is null or exists(transactions[transactionId == bankingItem.transactionId])

rules.description: If documentId is present, it must resolve to documents.documentId.
rules.expression: documentId is null or exists(documents[documentId == bankStatementImport.documentId])

rules.description: OFX duplicate detection should use sourceFormat, bank account identity, and fitId.
rules.expression: recommended_unique_key = (import.sourceFormat, import.bankAccount.bankId?, import.bankAccount.accountId, ofx.fitId)

rules.description: When itemCount and valuePerItem are present, approxValueTotal should approximately equal itemCount * valuePerItem.
rules.expression: approx_equal(decimal(approxValueTotal), integer(itemCount) * decimal(valuePerItem))

rules.description: numberRemoved must not exceed count.
rules.expression: removalDetails.numberRemoved is null or count is null or removalDetails.numberRemoved <= count

rules.description: If accountId is present on a budget line, it should resolve to chartOfAccounts.
rules.expression: accountId is null or exists(chartOfAccounts[accountId == budgetLine.accountId or Number == budgetLine.accountId])
